recommendations.title: Maniac
recommendations.overview: As he helps a young artist with her upcoming exhibition, the owner of a mannequin shop's deadly, suppressed desires come to the surface.

recommendations.title: P2
recommendations.overview: A businesswoman finds herself locked with a unhinged security guard in a parking garage after getting stuck working late on Christmas Eve.

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn at Tahoe
recommendations.overview: A small-time crime boss kills a drug dealer without realizing that the drug dealer works for the biggest crime boss in the country.

recommendations.title: Night of the Hunted
recommendations.overview: When an unsuspecting woman stops at a remote gas station in the dead of night, she's made the plaything of a sociopath sniper with a secret vendetta. To survive, she must not only dodge his bullets and fight for her life, but also figure out who want

recommendations.title: Beauty and the Beast
recommendations.overview: Follow the adventures of Belle, a bright young woman who finds herself in the castle of a prince who's been turned into a mysterious beast. With the help of the castle's enchanted staff, Belle soon learns the most important lesson of all -- that true

recommendations.title: Sinister 2
recommendations.overview: A young mother and her twin sons move into a rural house that's marked for death.

recommendations.title: Goodnight Mommy
recommendations.overview: When twin brothers arrive home to find their mother’s demeanor altered and face covered in surgical bandages, they begin to suspect the woman beneath the gauze might not be their mother.

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: High Tension
recommendations.overview: Best friends Marie and Alexia decide to spend a quiet weekend at Alexia's parents' secluded farmhouse. But on the night of their arrival, the girls' idyllic getaway turns into an endless night of horror.

recommendations.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
recommendations.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.
